SEARCH
Package com.hotelreservation.reservation.service

Class ReservationService

java.lang.Object
com.hotelreservation.reservation.service.ReservationService
@Service public class ReservationService extends Object
Service layer for reservation management business logic.

Handles booking creation with date validation, availability checking, and server-side billing calculation. Also provides retrieval and cancellation operations.

Room data is fetched from the Room Service via RoomClient (OpenFeign), keeping each service's data isolated in its own database (microservice data independence).

Key business rules enforced:

  • Check-in must be strictly before check-out.
  • Check-in date cannot be in the past.
  • No two reservations for the same room may overlap in dates.
  • Total amount is always computed server-side — never accepted from the client.

  • Constructor Details

    • ReservationService

      public ReservationService(ReservationRepository reservationRepository, RoomClient roomClient)
      Constructs the service with the required repository and Feign client.
      Parameters:
      reservationRepository - JPA repository for reservation persistence
      roomClient - Feign client for fetching room data from the Room Service

  • Method Details

    • createReservation

      @Transactional public ReservationDTO createReservation(ReservationDTO dto, Long userId, String username)
      Creates a new reservation after passing all validation checks.

      Validation and processing steps:

      1. Fetch room details from the Room Service via Feign.
      2. Validate that check-in is strictly before check-out.
      3. Validate that check-in is not in the past.
      4. Check for date overlap with existing reservations for the same room.
      5. Calculate total amount server-side: nights × pricePerNight.
      6. Persist and return the new reservation.
      Parameters:
      dto - the reservation request containing roomId and date range
      userId - the authenticated user's ID (extracted from JWT by the API Gateway)
      username - the authenticated user's username (forwarded by the API Gateway)
      Returns:
      the persisted reservation as a ReservationDTO
      Throws:
      APIException - with 400 BAD_REQUEST for invalid dates
      APIException - with 409 CONFLICT if the room is already booked

    • getAllReservations

      public List<ReservationDTO> getAllReservations()
      Retrieves all reservations in the system. Intended for admin access only.
      Returns:
      list of all reservations as ReservationDTO; empty if none exist

    • getMyReservations

      public List<ReservationDTO> getMyReservations(Long userId)
      Retrieves all reservations belonging to a specific user, ordered by check-in date descending.
      Parameters:
      userId - the ID of the authenticated user
      Returns:
      the user's reservations as a list of ReservationDTO

    • cancelMyReservation

      @Transactional public void cancelMyReservation(Long reservationId, Long userId)
      Cancels a specific reservation owned by the requesting user.

      Ownership is verified before deletion: a user may not cancel another user's reservation through this method.

      Parameters:
      reservationId - the ID of the reservation to cancel
      userId - the authenticated user's ID
      Throws:
      ResourceNotFoundException - if the reservation does not exist
      APIException - with 403 FORBIDDEN if the reservation belongs to a different user

    • deleteReservation

      @Transactional public void deleteReservation(Long reservationId)
      Deletes any reservation by ID regardless of ownership. Intended for admin use only.
      Parameters:
      reservationId - the ID of the reservation to delete
      Throws:
      ResourceNotFoundException - if no reservation with the given ID exists
